news.title: German energy minister calls nuclear phase-out 'huge mistake'
news.summary: Katherina Reiche, Germany's economy and energy minister, discussed the likely impact on the country's economy if the Iran conflict continues — as well as the need for a correction to energy policies in Europe.

news.title: Aalo completes assembly of experimental reactor
news.summary: Aalo Atomics has unveiled its completed Critical Test Reactor at the Idaho National Laboratory, expecting to achieve criticality well before the 4 July deadline.

news.title: Vietnam, Russia sign agreement on new nuclear plant
news.summary: An intergovernmental agreement has been signed on cooperation in the construction of the Ninh Thuan 1 Nuclear Power Plant in Vietnam, to feature two VVER-1200 reactors.

news.title: Uzbekistan and Russia mark SMR construction progress
news.summary: Russia and Uzbekistan signed a roadmap for nuclear cooperation as initial concrete was poured for the first small modular reactor at Uzbekistan's first nuclear power plant.

news.title: In Pictures: Akkuyu 2's polar crane installed
news.summary: The main part of the polar crane for unit 2 at Turkey's Akkuyu Nuclear Power Plant has been installed at a height of 38.5 metres.

news.title: IAEA Releases Updated Regulations for Safe Transport of Radioactive Material
news.summary: Updated safety regulations covering the international transport of radioactive material have been released by the IAEA.

news.title: How Do We Keep Radioactive Material Safe and Secure During Transport?
news.summary: IAEA explainer on protocols and technologies ensuring radioactive material remains safe during transport.

news.title: Global Leaders Affirm Central Role for Nuclear at 2026 Nuclear Energy Summit
news.summary: World leaders reaffirmed nuclear energy's critical role in achieving net-zero targets at the 2026 Nuclear Energy Summit in Paris.

news.title: Global Leaders Convene in France for Nuclear Energy Summit
news.summary: The second Nuclear Energy Summit brought together heads of state and energy ministers to accelerate nuclear deployment worldwide.

news.title: UK provides £1bn to drive zero-emission trucks and vans uptake
news.summary: Companies expected to save up to £81,000 off the heaviest zero-emission trucks and up to £5,000 off new zero-emission vans under the new government scheme.

news.title: EDF and Matrix team up for 500MW battery storage in Scotland
news.summary: The large-scale battery storage project, currently under construction, is scheduled to start commercial operations in summer 2027.

news.title: Strathclyde Uni partners with Japan Maritime United on offshore wind
news.summary: The partnership will focus on standardisation and mass production of floating offshore wind turbines.

news.title: Hydrogen Production: Moeve and Exolum Join SHYNE
news.summary: Moeve and Exolum join as promoting partners of the Spanish Hydrogen Network (SHYNE), accelerating the country's renewable hydrogen development.

news.title: thyssenkrupp Steel expands Duisburg lab for hydrogen-based iron ore testing
news.summary: thyssenkrupp Steel is expanding its Duisburg lab as it moves toward carbon-neutral steel using hydrogen-based processes.

news.title: Wienerberger's Denton Plant Pioneers 100% Green Hydrogen Firing
news.summary: Wienerberger UK & Ireland's Denton plant has become a pioneer in 100% green hydrogen firing for brick manufacturing.

news.title: Bradford-Humber Hydrogen Valley Project, Lighter than Aire, Kicks Off
news.summary: The Lighter than Aire hydrogen valley project launches in the Bradford-Humber region — one of the UK's largest planned hydrogen infrastructure initiatives.

news.title: Germany Passes Hydrogen Acceleration Law to Boost Industry Growth
news.summary: Germany's new Hydrogen Acceleration Law aims to fast-track hydrogen infrastructure investment and industrial adoption.

news.title: First Hornsea 3 Offshore Substation Stands Complete
news.summary: Heerema Marine Contractors has completed the installation of the first offshore substation at the Hornsea 3 wind farm.

news.title: Foundation Installation Coming Up at Hornsea 3
news.summary: The installation of wind turbine foundations at Orsted's Hornsea 3 offshore wind farm is set to begin imminently.

news.title: Welsh Port Granted £64 Million for Floating Wind Hub
news.summary: The UK government has announced up to £64 million to develop a Welsh port as a floating offshore wind manufacturing hub.

news.title: Crown Estate unveils plans for new offshore wind leasing round in UK
news.summary: Plans for offshore wind leasing round 6 have been announced, expected to launch in the first half of 2027.

news.title: UK government vetoes Mingyang's plans for Scottish wind turbine factory
news.summary: The UK government has rejected Chinese manufacturer Mingyang's plans to build a major wind turbine factory in Scotland.

news.title: Vestas announces plan for flagship offshore turbine factory in Scotland
news.summary: Vestas has announced plans to open a nacelle and hub factory for its flagship offshore wind turbine in Scotland.
